message:
fix(security): property allowlists and safe escaping for DOM injection cluster (#9143)

* fix(security): add property allowlists, URL validation, and safe markdown escaping for DOM injection vectors (Fixes #9126)

- SecretDrillDown: promote unsafeKeys to module-scoped UNSAFE_PROP_NAMES constant
  so the prototype-pollution guard is consistently reused across all fetch paths
- IframeEmbed: add sanitizeIframeUrl() that allows only http:/https: schemes;
  applied at all URL ingestion points (config prop, localStorage load, save)
  to block javascript:/data: scheme injection into the iframe src
- i18n-compliance.spec.ts: replace three (val as Record)[p] bracket-access
  patterns with a safeGetByPath() helper that rejects __proto__/constructor/
  prototype path segments; replace pipe-only escaping with full escapeMdCell()
  that also escapes backticks and HTML angle brackets
- console-error-scan.spec.ts: add matching escapeMdCell() helper and apply it
  to all console message text written into Markdown table cells
- standalone.ts: add escapeMdCell() helper and apply to message/path columns
  in the mission scan Markdown report to prevent markdown-injection

Eliminates 8 CodeQL high-severity alerts:
  3 js/remote-property-injection, 1 js/xss-through-dom, 4 js/incomplete-sanitization

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(security): escape backslashes before pipe/backtick in escapeMdCell (Fixes #9126)

CodeQL js/incomplete-sanitization: the initial escapeMdCell implementation
replaced | with \| and  but did not first escape backslashes in
the input. An attacker-controlled string containing \ could be rendered
as \| by a Markdown renderer, bypassing the pipe escaping. Fix by escaping
\ to \\\\ first in all three escapeMdCell helpers.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -136,6 +136,21 @@ function getOutputDir(): string {
   return dir
 }
 
+/**
+ * Escape a string for safe inclusion in a Markdown table cell.
+ * Prevents markdown injection via pipe characters, backticks, or HTML tags.
+ * Backslashes are escaped first so that subsequent replacements cannot be
+ * reinterpreted as escape sequences by the Markdown renderer.
+ */
+function escapeMdCell(text: string): string {
+  return text
+    .replace(/\\/g, '\\\\')
+    .replace(/\|/g, '\\|')
+    .replace(/`/g, '\\`')
+    .replace(/</g, '<')
+    .replace(/>/g, '>')
+}
+
 /** Deduplicate entries by message text within a route */
 function dedup(entries: ConsoleEntry[]): ConsoleEntry[] {
   const seen = new Set<string>()
@@ -232,8 +247,8 @@ function generateMarkdown(report: ScanReport): string {
         : e.type === 'error' ? '❌'
         : e.type === 'warning' ? '⚠️'
         : 'ℹ️'
-      // Truncate long messages and escape pipes
-      const msg = e.text.slice(0, 200).replace(/\|/g, '\\|').replace(/\n/g, ' ')
+      // Truncate long messages and escape markdown-injection characters
+      const msg = escapeMdCell(e.text.slice(0, 200).replace(/\n/g, ' '))
       lines.push(`| ${typeIcon} ${e.type} | ${msg} |`)
     }
     lines.push('')

@@ -55,6 +55,22 @@ export function scanMissionFile(jsonContent: string): FileScanResult {
   return fullScan(validation.data)
 }
 
+/**
+ * Escape a string for safe inclusion in a Markdown table cell.
+ * Prevents markdown injection via pipe characters, backticks, or HTML tags.
+ * Backslashes are escaped first so that subsequent replacements cannot be
+ * reinterpreted as escape sequences by the Markdown renderer.
+ * Used for all user/API-derived text inserted into table rows.
+ */
+function escapeMdCell(text: string): string {
+  return text
+    .replace(/\\/g, '\\\\')
+    .replace(/\|/g, '\\|')
+    .replace(/`/g, '\\`')
+    .replace(/</g, '<')
+    .replace(/>/g, '>')
+}
+
 /**
  * Format scan results as a markdown table suitable for PR comments.
  *
@@ -105,8 +121,8 @@ export function formatScanResultAsMarkdown(
 
   for (const f of result.findings) {
     const sev = `${severityIcon[f.severity] ?? ''} ${f.severity}`
-    const msg = f.message.replace(/\|/g, '\\|')
-    const path = (f.path || '—').replace(/\|/g, '\\|')
+    const msg = escapeMdCell(f.message)
+    const path = escapeMdCell(f.path || '—')
     lines.push(`| ${sev} | \`${f.code}\` | ${msg} | \`${path}\` |`)
   }
